regions.title: Detroit Minyan Finder
regions.sub: Vaad 5786 summer sheet · times resolve live for the day shown

hillelAA.name: Hillel of Ann Arbor (U of M)

regions.legend: Zmanim computed for your selected location (plag = GRA, netz + 10¾ sha'os zmaniyos; tzeis shown at 8.5° — your luach governs). Distances are straight-line approximations. "School in session" minyanim run only when the yeshiva is in session. Source: Vaad Harabbonim Detroit Metro Spring/Summer/Fall 5786 sheet (March 2026) — confirm with the shul; corrections: YosiHeber@gmail.com.

regions.title: Miami Minyanim (NMB)
